title: cyclosorus urophyllus
intro: Cyclosorus urophyllus, also known as the Needle Brake or Urostachys, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus urophyllus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Cyclosorus urophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as dried or used in tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
